messages.content: # Being blinded by the sun? Follow this guide!

# Method 1
> Go to Settings > Assetto Corsa > Video > Sunrays
> Uncheck Sunrays

# Method 2 
> Go to Settings > Custom shaders patch > LightingFX
> Change the brightness value and test to see if it fixes the issue. This is dependent on your Post-Process Filter.

# Method 3 
> Launch the game and when you load in, press the drive button 
> Place your mouse on the right side of the screen, and open the "**Post Process Filter**" app.
> Change the "**Exposure**" value to 100% or below, and/or try other PP Filters.
